_comment: Act 2 / Challenge 2.3 — Bascule Standoff (voice + combat). Loaded at /spiffs/challenge_2_3.json by beacon-fw and sim/index.ts.

voice._comment: Voice phase: operative speaks the four-step lowering sequence.
voice._fallback_note: When caps.voice is false, the beacon's own mic captures audio, uploads blob to /api/voice out-of-band, passes ref in VOICE_CAPTURE_SUBMIT body.

combat._comment: Combat phase: one RNG wave against the Bridge Tender Construct.
combat._fallback_note: When caps.seAttest is false, the server rolls RNG itself. When seRng + seSign are both present, badge produces a signed roll the server verifies.

custom.lesson: Chicago has 50+ movable bascule bridges. A counterweight equal to the leaf weight makes raising trivial. Sequence: lock traffic, release counterweight, lower leaf, secure locks.
custom._subghz_note: No sub-GHz mini-event for 2.3 (that is 2.1's mechanic). Voice + combat only.
